mapper.select:
SELECT ID, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, SYS_INVOICE_CODE, INVOICE_CODE, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, INVOICE_AMOUNT, STATUS, INVOICE,INVOICE_TYPE_CODE,INVOICE_TYPE_NAME, TAXATION_INVOICE, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE, INVOICE_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID AS debtorpaymentId, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_FD_INVOICE
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_INVOICE( ID, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, SYS_INVOICE_CODE, INVOICE_CODE, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, INVOICE_AMOUNT, STATUS, INVOICE, INVOICE_TYPE_CODE, INVOICE_TYPE_NAME, TAXATION_INVOICE, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE, INVOICE_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, HAS_NOT_RECEIPT_AMOUNT, RECEIPT_STATUS )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sysInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceTypeCode, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxationInvoice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxationInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{prepaymentTypeCode,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{prepaymentTypeName,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '10' )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_INVOICE SET COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SYS_INVOICE_CODE = #{sysInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_CODE = #{invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_AMOUNT = #{invoiceAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, INVOICE = #{invoice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_TYPE_CODE = #{invoiceTypeCode,jdbcType=BIGINT}, INVOICE_TYPE_NAME = #{invoiceTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE = #{taxationInvoice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAXATION_INVOICE_CODE = #{taxationInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_TIME = #{invoiceTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_FD_INVOICE SET INVOICE_CODE = #{invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE T_FD_INVOICE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.ID, t1.STATEMENT AS statementId, t.STATEMENT_NO AS STATEMENT_NO , "TYPE" AS type, t1.RATE_ITEM_CODE, t1.RATE_ITEM_NAME, t1.UNIT_CODE, t1.UNIT_NAME, t1."NUMBER" AS NUMBER_COUNT, t1."NUMBER2" AS NUMBER_COUNT2, t1.RATE AS pieceAmount, t1.AMOUNT AS amount, t1.INVOICE_AMOUNT AS invoiceAmount, t1.INVOICE_NUMBER AS invoiceNumber, t1.TAX, t1.TAX_AMOUNT, t1.RATE_ID FROM T_COST_STATEMENT t LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL t1 ON t.id = t1.STATEMENT WHERE t1.ID = #{id}

SELECT t1.ID, t1.STATEMENT AS statementId, t.STATEMENT_NO AS STATEMENT_NO , "TYPE" AS type, t.STATUS status, t1.RATE_ITEM_CODE, t1.RATE_ITEM_NAME, t1.UNIT_CODE, t1.UNIT_NAME, t1."NUMBER" AS NUMBER_COUNT, t1."NUMBER2" AS NUMBER_COUNT2, t1.RATE AS pieceAmount, t1.AMOUNT AS amount, t1.INVOICE_AMOUNT AS invoiceAmount, t1.INVOICE_NUMBER AS invoiceNumber, t1.TAX, t1.TAX_AMOUNT, t1.RATE_ID FROM T_COST_STATEMENT t LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL t1 ON t.id = t1.STATEMENT WHERE t1."NUMBER" > 0 AND t1.ID
#{item.statementDetailId}

SELECT t1.ID, t1.STATEMENT AS statementId, t.STATEMENT_NO AS STATEMENT_NO , "TYPE" AS type, t1.RATE_ITEM_CODE, t1.RATE_ITEM_NAME, t1.UNIT_CODE, t1.UNIT_NAME, t1."NUMBER" AS NUMBER_COUNT, t1."NUMBER2" AS NUMBER_COUNT2, t1.RATE AS pieceAmount, t1.AMOUNT AS amount, t1.INVOICE_AMOUNT AS invoiceAmount, t1.INVOICE_NUMBER AS invoiceNumber, t1.TAX, t1.TAX_AMOUNT, t1.RATE_ID FROM T_COST_STATEMENT t LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL t1 ON t.id = t1.STATEMENT WHERE t1."NUMBER" > 0 AND t.ID
#{item}
mapper.update: update T_FD_INVOICE set INVOICE_CODE = #{infoTypeCode}, MACHINE_INVOICE_NUM = #{machineInvoiceNum}, PDF_URL = #{pdfurl}, PDF_MSG = #{pdfmsg} where SYS_INVOICE_CODE = #{number}
mapper.select:
SELECT MAX(SYS_INVOICE_CODE) FROM T_FD_INVOICE
SYS_INVOICE_CODE LIKE #{codeWith,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select TCS.ID STATEMENT_ID,T.ID,T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID
from T_COST_STATEMENT TCS left join T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD on TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT left join T_COST_SHIP T on TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = T.ID where TCS.ID = #{statementId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and T.ID is not null and T.TYPE = '10' GROUP BY TCS.ID ,T.ID,T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID
SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM where SHIPVOYAGE_ID = (SELECT SHIPVOYAGE_ID FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE ID = #{id} )

select TCS.ID STATEMENT_ID,T.ID,T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID
from T_COST_STATEMENT TCS left join T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD on TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT left join T_COST_SHIP T on TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = T.ID where TCS.ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
and T.ID is not null and T.TYPE = '10' GROUP BY TCS.ID ,T.ID,T.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID
